title: 豪掷61亿买地，字节人不用再抢健身房了？
content: ByteDance has spent about 6.1 billion yuan acquiring two 9‑thousand‑square‑meter sites in Beijing’s Haidian district, near top universities and research institutes, to expand its offices and reduce leasing costs. The properties, slated to house 4,200 workstations and 288 hotel rooms, will ease employee complaints about gym access and support the company’s growing AI workforce. This move follows ByteDance’s broader national real‑estate strategy, which now totals over 300 billion yuan and 1.57 million square metres, driven by a 150,000‑plus‑employee global presence and a valuation topping 600 billion dollars.

title: 🔥 VTJ.PRO v2.3.5 发布：AI 提示词升级、依赖锁定及多项体验优化
content:
VTJ.PRO 团队今日正式发布 v2.3.5 版本。本次更新聚焦 AI 能力增强、开发体验打磨及工程稳定性提升，修复了元数据类型枚举解析错误、生成应用新窗口拦截等关键问题，并优化了活跃用户统计方式，进一步巩固 VTJ.PRO 作为“AI 驱动的 Vue3 低代码平台”的生产级可靠性。  

主要更新内容
🤖 AI 系统全面进化

AI 提示词升级至 v3.0.7：优化了自然语言转代码的语义理解能力，尤其在复杂表单、数据表格等场景下生成代码更精准。

解决“一句话生成应用”新窗口拦截问题：当 AI 生成的代码需要打开新标签页时…

title: Anthropic 推出顶级 AI 安全模型 Claude Mythos，暂时仅供科技巨头试用
content: Anthropic released a preview of its next‑generation AI model, Mythos, described internally as the most powerful to date, with significant advances in reasoning and cyber‑security. The system can autonomously scan software for thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities and identify legacy code defects, serving as a “super probe” for secure coding. Due to its high offensive potential, Mythos is not publicly available; it is being trialed by major tech companies like Apple and in discussions with U.S. federal officials for national defense applications.

title: 阿里组织架构调整：通义实验室升级为事业部 李飞飞出任阿里云 CTO
content: Alibaba Group has restructured its AI units. A new Technology Committee has been created, led by CEO Wu Yongming with members Zhou Jingren, Wu Zeming, and Li Feifei. Tongyi Laboratory has been upgraded to the Tongyi Large‑Model Division, headed by Zhou Jingren. Li Feifei will serve as Alibaba Cloud's Chief Technology Officer, while Wu Zeming focuses on the group’s CTO responsibilities. Taobao Flash Shopping’s CEO position is taken over by Lei Yanqun.

title: 红果免费短剧 App 月活突破 3 亿大关：两年半用户暴增 30 倍
content: Red果, a free short‑drama app, reached 300 million monthly active users in February 2026, up 30‑fold from its launch in August 2023. With an average daily engagement of 125 minutes, it far outpaces second‑place 河马剧场 and dominates the industry, holding roughly 90 % of the independent app market. The app appeals to both millennials and seniors, with 40 million monthly users over 50. Its high‑quality, free content model has also driven rapid growth in the related manga‑drama sub‑app.

title: 强脑科技发布BrainCo Revo 3智能灵巧手 具备21个主动自由度
content: BrainCo Revo 3 is a next‑generation dexterous robotic hand released by QiangBrain Technology. It features 21 active degrees of freedom and uses a proprietary “full‑direct drive + retrace drive” architecture for high‑performance, integrated motion control. The hand supports 33 grasping gestures, 3 Hz rapid opening and closing, a full‑hand tactile array, and finger‑tip touch‑vision fusion. It is compatible with mainstream open‑source ecosystems and enables one‑click deployment, reducing development barriers in related fields.

title: 字节跳动豪掷 33 亿元在北京再次拿地
content: ByteDance’s wholly owned Beijing subsidiary bought a 48,900 m² research land parcel in Haidian District for about 3.305 billion yuan, with 12.8 k m² of office‑development space planned. The 50‑year lease specifies construction to start by 31 March 2027 and finish by 30 March 2020 (2030). Earlier in February, ByteDance secured two additional parcels totaling 3.95 k m² for 2.8 billion yuan, with a 20‑year self‑sustainability clause.

title: Anthropic 挖角微软高管，领导 AI 基础设施建设
content: Anthropic PBC hired Microsoft veteran Eric Boyd to lead its infrastructure team, focusing on expanding cloud capacity to support the rapid rise in demand for its AI products, especially Claude Code. The company plans to invest $50 billion in new AI data centers to maintain stability for its growing user base. Boyd’s experience managing Microsoft’s AI platform is expected to help Anthropic meet record global usage.

title: 马斯克起诉 OpenAI 案升级：要求罢免 CEO 奥特曼
content: Elon Musk has sued OpenAI to stop its transition to a for‑profit entity. He seeks to remove CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman, and to restore the company’s non‑profit status, promising compensation to its charitable arm if he wins. Musk argues that the organization, which he helped launch, should not be placed under private, profit‑driven control. He also accuses OpenAI and Microsoft of violating the founding mission and has requested investigations into alleged unfair practices.

title: GitHub Universe is back: We want you to take the stage
content: GitHub Universe returns Oct 28–29 in San Francisco, offering a chance to submit talks by May 1. The Call for Sessions welcomes proposals showcasing recent projects, lessons, and useful takeaways; speakers can also be nominated. The event features demo, thought‑leadership, and interactive tracks, including a new Ship & Tell format for founders. Past sessions blend storytelling with practical insights, covering Git workflows, CI/CD security, rapid prototyping, Kubernetes security, and AI‑driven fixes. Review the submission guide for details and submit before the deadline.

title: 河北孟村案“完美妻子”之死，凶手已被执行死刑 | 原文
content: In Hebei’s Mengcun case, the accused, Jin Hao, was executed on December 9, 2025, after the Cangzhou Intermediate People’s Court sentenced him to death for intentional murder. His mother, Zhang, received a two‑year, two‑month prison term for destroying evidence following the incident. Jin appealed, but on January 13, 2026, the second‑level court upheld the original ruling in a closed hearing. The case, involving the death of Liu Yuqing, had drawn significant public attention.

title: MacState v1.8.0 发布，轻量级 macOS 菜单栏系统监控工具
content:

设置面板

充电信息

优化 / Improved
设置图标合并 — 设置齿轮图标合并到指标状态栏项中（最右侧），不再独立占位，状态栏更紧凑
CPU 占用大幅降低 — 从 11-15% 降至 ~3%：GPUService 合并 IOKit 枚举并缓存结果；BatteryService 缓存 service handle；SMCService 温度/风扇缓存多个…

title: DeepSeek 上线专家模式：产品首次引入分层设计，V4 模型传闻再起
content:
DeepSeek 网页端迎来重要更新，在输入框上方新增「快速模式」与「专家模式」两项功能。这是 DeepSeek 自年初走红以来，首次在产品端引入模式分层设计。与此同时，带有图片图标的「视觉模型」功能也已开启灰度测试。 此次上线的两种模式在生成速度与任务处理范围上形成明显区分。快速模式侧重于日常对话与即时响应，适合处理简单快速的问答场景，同时支持上传图片和文件进行文字识别。专家模式则更擅长处理复杂任务，如内容生成、代码编程、网页开发等，具备深度思考和智能搜索能力，但目前暂不支持多模态文件上传，且处于限量供应状态。

据 DeepSeek…

title: BitTorrent 创始人炮轰 Claude 团队：Vibe Coding 已走火入魔
content: Bram Cohen, the founder of the BitTorrent protocol, criticizes Anthropic’s Claude team for embracing “Vibe Coding” – a practice where developers rely entirely on AI to generate code without reviewing or contributing to the underlying logic. He argues this leads to poor code quality, evidenced by the leaked Claude Code, which contains redundant patterns. Cohen stresses that AI should aid in cleaning technical debt rather than replace human oversight, and that responsible coding requires human review and accountability.

content: Anthropic released Claude Mythos Preview, a high‑performance model excelling in code repair and math reasoning, but capped behind a 40‑partner contract due to security risks. Project Glasswing partners with major tech firms to use Mythos for defensive vulnerability scanning, under a $100 million credit. Zai released large‑scale GLM‑5.1 (754 B parameters) for Agentic tasks, while GCP’s DeepSeek added “Fast” and “Expert” modes. Other highlights include Microsoft’s Harrier embedding model topping MTEB‑v2, Meta’s EUPE perception encoder for edge devices, and GitHub Copilot CLI now supporting BYOK. OpenAI’s Codex user base hit 3 M, and OpenAI Prism launched a paper‑reviewer workflow. The day also saw Firmus’ $5 M+ funding, Intel’s Terafab partnership, and cross‑vendor efforts to curb adversarial model copying.

title: Claude Code 的 skills 源码解析
content: Claude Code's “skills” system restructures LLM interactions by packaging reusable ability units that include a markdown‑based `SKILL.md` definition, optional scripts, and resources. Skills are loaded from various directories (global, project, managed), parsed for frontmatter, and registered as prompt commands. When invoked via slash commands, the system compiles the markdown into a prompt, optionally runs shell commands, and supplies tool permissions. This design separates intent from execution, enabling modular, maintainable, and context‑aware AI tasks.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 古茗前端团队
eventKey: claude-code-skills-源码解析
normalizedTitle: claude code 的 skills 源码解析
representativeSources: 掘金本周最热 - 古茗前端团队
